title: Find Square Root of the Sum of Squares

statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.
statement.inputFormat: A single integer or an array of integers
statement.outputFormat: The square root of the sum of the squares of all elements in the array.
statement.notes: Ensure to handle non-integer inputs and edge cases

examples.explanation: The sum of squares is 25 and its square root is 5
The sum of squares is 1^2+2^2+3^2 = 14 and its square root is approximately 3.7416573867739413

starterCode.java: public class Solution { public double sumSquareRoot(int[] nums) { // TODO: implement ; return 0; } }

buggyStarterCode.cpp: class Solution { public: vector<double> sumSquareRoot(vector<int>& nums) { double sum = 0; for(int i = 0; i < nums.size(); i++) sum += nums[i]; return {sqrt(sum)}; } };
buggyStarterCode.java: public class Solution { public double sumSquareRoot(int[] nums) { double sum = 0; for(int i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) sum += nums[i]; return Math.sqrt(sum); } }
buggyStarterCode.python: class Solution: def sum_square_root(self, nums: list[int]) -> float: sum = 0 for i in nums: sum += i return (sum ** 2) ** 0.5
buggyStarterCode.javascript: var sumSquareRoot = function(nums) { var sum = 0; for(var i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) sum += nums[i]; return Math.sqrt(sum*sum); }
